report.summary: Drafted 6 social posts + 1 ecosystem thread (5-part) + 1 Discord/TG announcement + newsletter addendum. Created 2 SVG social cards (MegaETH guide spotlight + Ecosystem expansion). V3 cycle shifts focus to new content drops (MegaETH + Story Protocol guides, 5 ecosystem pages) while maintaining Iran deadline/extreme fear framing from v2.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Deadline Night tweet — Iran ultimatum expires tonight, whale accumulation (8,400 BTC), links to fear-greed-timeline
MegaETH Guide spotlight tweet — 100K+ TPS, Streaming EVM, 39M day-one txns, Paradigm + Vitalik backing
Story Protocol spotlight tweet — IP tokenization L1, $70-80T market, Programmable IP Licenses
Ecosystem Expansion 5-part thread — Chainlink (1,900+ integrations), dYdX ($1B+ daily vol), GMX (real yield), Ethena ($5B+ TVL), Jupiter (50% Solana DEX vol)
Extreme Fear historical pattern tweet — updated with Mar 2026 as 4th data point (3-for-3 on rallies)
DCA in Extreme Fear tool spotlight — DCA Calculator feature walkthrough
Discord/Telegram evening update — market snapshot + 7 new content pieces + tool links + Iran scenarios
Newsletter addendum for Thu Mar 27 — MegaETH + Story Protocol guide summaries + 5 ecosystem pages

sections.title: Strategy Notes
items: V3 SHIFT: Previous cycles (v1/v2) were dominated by Iran crisis coverage. V3 balances crisis framing with content drops — 7 new pages (2 guides + 5 ecosystem) give us fresh material to promote alongside market commentary.
Ecosystem thread is high-value: 5 protocols with large existing communities (LINK, DYDX, GMX, ENA, JUP) — tagging these communities on social can drive organic reach.
MegaETH + Story Protocol are search-interest plays: both are trending topics with limited existing coverage. Early indexed guides can capture long-tail organic traffic.

DEPLOY BLOCKER PERSISTS: Git locks (7 days). 420 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES config but only 413 deployed to production. New guide links (megaeth, story-protocol) won't resolve live until deployment. All social posts link to existing live pages or note 'coming soon'.

Tool relevance at cycle-high: Fear & Greed Timeline, DCA Calculator, Liquidation Heatmap, and Portfolio Tracker are all maximally relevant during extreme fear + geopolitical uncertainty. Every social post links to at least one tool.
